title.en: DeepMind leadership says society has only a few years to prepare
title.zh: DeepMind 负责人称社会只剩几年准备时间

body.en: Expert tone shifts from distant speculation toward near-term preparation.
body.zh: 专家语气从远期猜测，转向更近的现实准备。

title.en: OpenAI says it knows how to build traditionally understood AGI
title.zh: OpenAI 称已知道如何构建传统意义上的 AGI

body.en: A public confidence signal from a frontier lab, separated from delivery proof.
body.zh: 这是来自前沿实验室的公开信心信号，但仍要和真实交付分开看。

title.en: Coding agents become useful daily tools
title.zh: 编码智能体成为日常可用工具

body.en: Claude Code, Codex-style workflows, and agent frameworks make autonomy feel less abstract.
body.zh: Claude Code、Codex 类工作流和智能体框架，让自主执行不再只是抽象概念。

title.en: Benchmarks saturate faster than definitions stabilize
title.zh: 基准刷得很快，定义稳得很慢

body.en: The clock should move with product reality, not leaderboard theater alone.
body.zh: 时钟应该更多跟随产品现实，而不是只跟排行榜起舞。
